results.original_title: ワルキューレ FINAL LIVE TOUR 2023 ～Last Mission～ at 幕張メッセ 国際展示場
results.overview: Features the first arena tour in the history of "Macross," which was held from May 20 to June 4, 2023 and attracted 74,000 people. This live video compiles the last-day performance at Makuhari Messe International Exhibition Hall. In addition, the documentary footage of Day 5 & 6 in Makuhari is included. The cover artwork features a newly drawn illustration by Chisa Minota. The cover artwork features a newly drawn illustration by Chisa Minota. The Blu-ray features 5.1ch surround and 2ch stereo W sound mode (*The documentary is in 2ch only).
results.title: WALKURE FINAL LIVE TOUR 2023 -Last Mission- at Makuhari Messe (Day 6)

results.original_title: ワルキューレ FINAL LIVE TOUR 2023 ～Last Mission～ at 東京有明アリーナ
results.overview: Features the first arena tour in the history of "Macross," which was held from May 20 to June 4, 2023 and attracted 74,000 people. This live video compiles the first-day performance at Tokyo Ariake Arena. In addition, the documentary footage of Day 1 & 2 in Ariake is included. The cover artwork features a newly drawn illustration by Chisa Minota.
results.title: WALKURE FINAL LIVE TOUR 2023 -Last Mission- at Tokyo Ariake Arena (Day1)

results.overview: The film is a key film project for the 100th anniversary of the founding of the Party by the Propaganda Department of the Guangdong Provincial Party Committee, revealing the unknown revolutionary party history of Shantou Red Transportation Station. The film tells the story of a group of unsung heroes in Shantou who, during the period of the Agrarian Revolution, fought against the enemy with their blood and lives in the revolutionary struggle
results.title: Faces in the Crowd
